sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85691" key="pontopla/nos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποντο-πλάνος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πλάνη</etym>) <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δελφῖνες, νῆες,</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0579.tlg001:24:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24.8</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0579.tlg001:75:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">75.6</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
